    "Breaker and conductor ampacity mismatch detected during staging",
    "Conductor size is insufficient for the overcurrent protective device rating under NEC 240 and 110.14(C) termination temperature limits"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the staged materials and halt installation",
    "Re-evaluate the engineered drawings and specifications to match the correct breaker size with the appropriate conductor gauge",
    "Verify termination temperature ratings (60C/75C/90C) per NEC 110.14(C) before re-staging"
  ],
  "rationale": "The staged materials exhibit a mismatch between the overcurrent protective device (breaker) rating and the conductor ampacity. Installing these components would violate NEC 240 and 110.14(C), creating a severe fire and equipment damage hazard due to inadequate conductor protection.",

    "NEC 240",
    "NEC 110.14(C)"
  ]
